faq_1_q: How does نماذج Ai generate ads?
faq_1_a: Our diffusion model swaps your product into curated ad templates while preserving lighting, perspective and scale automatically.
faq_2_q: Do I own the rights to the output?
faq_2_a: Yes. All generations are commercial-use, royalty-free, and yours forever.
faq_3_q: What file types do you support?
faq_3_a: PNG. Transparent PNGs work best for clean replacements.
faq_4_q: Can I use my own templates?
faq_4_a: On Studio and Scale plans you can upload brand templates and presets that are reusable across your team.
faq_5_a: Yes — 2 free generations, no credit card required.
